  • Uses of TypedFinder in com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector

    Method
    Description
    TypedFinder<Type>
    TypedFinder.byId(int id)
    Search for a UserManagementItem by it's ID.
    TypedFinder<Type>
    TypedFinder.byName(String name)
    Search for a UserManagementItem by it's name.
    TypedFinder<Type>
    TypedFinder.combinedBy(com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.DescriptorOperation op)
    If called multiple times, the last call wins and overwrites the first one.
    <Type extends com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserManagementItem>
    TypedFinder<Type>
    UserManagement.find(Class<Type> type)
    Finds an item.
    TypedFinder<Type>

    TypedFinder<Type>
    TypedFinder.use(com.saperion.jcs.modules.api.LazyLoadingStrategy strategy)
     
    TypedFinder<Type>
    TypedFinder.with(com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.DescriptorField field, Object value)
    Searches for a UserManagementItem by using one field and one value.
    TypedFinder<Type>
    TypedFinder.with(List<com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.Criterion> criteria)
    Searches for items UserManagementItem that match the given criteria.
    TypedFinder<Type>
    TypedFinder.with(Map<com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.DescriptorField,Object> keyValues)
    Searches for items with any of the specified values.
